description_long: This armchair is constructed entirely from large, rectangular stone blocks, giving it a robust and monumental appearance. The seat is recessed within thick, blocky armrests and a high, arched backrest, all made from the same stone material. The backrest forms a semi-circular arch, composed of carefully fitted stone segments, while the sides and front are built from stacked stone slabs. There are no visible cushions or soft elements; the entire structure is solid and angular. The armrests are wide and flat, matching the geometric style of the rest of the chair. The overall design evokes the look of ancient stone architecture, making it suitable for outdoor urban environments such as plazas or parks.
description: A heavy, stone-block armchair with a high arched backrest and wide, flat armrests, featuring a solid, architectural design with no visible cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed seat, thick stone armrests, and the arched backrest with visible stone block construction.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered stone blocks forming the armrest and the arch of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full semi-circular stone arch and the solid, blocky back with no openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same block construction and the depth of the seat area.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, flat, and blocky stone armrests
attribute_leg_type: no visible legs; solid stone base
